input.background: A randomized placebo-controlled trial was carried out to investigate the capacity of aspirin to prevent pregnancy-induced hypertension and preeclamptic toxaemia (Schiff et al., 1989). The study was conducted on women at high risk of these conditions.
input.question: The actual sample size was 65. What was the power of the study to detect the difference considered in (a)?

output.answer: Provide the calculation or reference for determining the power of the study with a sample size of 65 to detect the specified difference in risk.
